era: Hip-Hop. E=5 -- the combined energy of Filipino-American identity, Mass Line Media independence, and community-building artistry. Geo (George Quibuyen) is the same artist documented at degree 99 (Blue Scholars, as Geologic) and degree 152 (Prometheus Brown). Third entry, third name. Twentieth degree in the hip-hop era (134-153).

location.formative: Filipino-American community. Beacon Hill. Mass Line Media headquarters. Blue Scholars ecosystem. Label founder and community builder.
location.career: Geo / Geologic / Prometheus Brown / George Quibuyen. Three names, three entries, three dimensions. MC (99), activist (152), institution builder (153). Mass Line Media founder.

formed: Solo career under 'Geo' name (alongside Blue Scholars and Prometheus Brown identities)

members.name: Geo (George Quibuyen)
members.note: Filipino-American. Third name: Geologic (duo), Prometheus Brown (activist solo), Geo (label head solo). Mass Line Media founder. Community infrastructure builder.

associated_musicians.name: Sabzi (Blue Scholars)
associated_musicians.note: Blue Scholars = Geologic + Sabzi. Sabzi also at 101, 145 (Common Market).

associated_musicians.name: Mass Line Media roster
associated_musicians.note: Seattle hip-hop and Filipino-American artists on the Mass Line Media platform.

associated_musicians.name: Prometheus Brown identity
associated_musicians.note: Activist solo identity. One degree before Geo at 153. Consecutive same-artist entries.

theory_nodes.concept: Three-name artist -- George Quibuyen appears under three names across three entries: Geologic (99, duo MC), Prometheus Brown (152, activist solo), Geo (153, label head solo). Name progression tracks artistic evolution from emerging MC to politically charged soloist to mature institution builder.
examples: Geologic at 99: MC name within Blue Scholars duo. Geological metaphor: deep, layered.
Prometheus Brown at 152: solo declaration of independence. Mythological fire-bringer.
Geo at 153: simplified name. Just the root. The earth. Established identity needs no announcement.
One degree separates Prometheus Brown (152) from Geo (153) -- closest consecutive same-artist entries.
theory_nodes.description: Three names, three entries, one artist. Name evolution as artistic evolution.

genealogy.relationship: Geo at 153. Third name documented. Three dimensions of one artist.

theory_nodes.concept: Mass Line Media as community infrastructure -- label founded by Geo as platform for Seattle hip-hop and Filipino-American voices. Label as community hub, not just distribution. Curation as creation. From individual expression to collective empowerment.
examples: Mass Line Media: Seattle-based independent label. Hip-hop + Filipino-American focus.
Label name references 'mass line' from community organizing -- staying connected to the people.
Releases tied to community events, cultural celebrations, political actions.
Platform for Filipino-American artists. Infrastructure that didn't exist before.
theory_nodes.description: Label as community. Mass Line Media. Infrastructure building.

genealogy.relationship: Geo at 153. Label as community documented.

theory_nodes.concept: Consecutive same-artist entries -- degrees 152 and 153 are back-to-back entries for George Quibuyen under different names. First time in the engine that the same person appears in consecutive degrees. Different names represent different modes of creative practice.
examples: 152: Prometheus Brown -- the politically charged solo identity, artist-activist.
153: Geo -- the simplified name, label head, community builder.
One degree apart. Two modes of the same practice. Writing songs vs. building infrastructure.
First consecutive same-artist entries in 153 degrees of engine operation.
theory_nodes.description: Consecutive same-artist entries. 152-153. First in engine.

genealogy.relationship: Geo at 153. Consecutive same-artist pattern established.

cross_references.relationship: DUO CONNECTION! First entry for George Quibuyen as Geologic. 54 degrees before Geo at 153. The duo that started it all.
CONSECUTIVE! Same artist, one degree apart. Prometheus Brown (activist solo, 152) to Geo (label head solo, 153). First consecutive same-artist entries in the engine.
REUNION! Three degrees ahead. Blue Scholars return at 156 after documenting both solo identities (152, 153). The duo reunites.
SABZI NETWORK! Geo's duo partner Sabzi at 101 (and 145) with RA Scion. Seven Blue Scholars ecosystem entries across 57 degrees.
